title: sempervivum × stenopetalum
intro: Sempervivum × stenopetalum, also known as 'Ruby Heart' or 'Hen and Chicks', is a hybrid succulent plant belonging to the Crassulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of salicylic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Sempervivum × stenopetalum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or oil, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies.
